creator: bugs-freebsd-org916@ketas.si.pri.ee
text:
someone help me to break it again?

i downgraded it by taking this diff off:

git diff ce4c5336197800f0b4ba8d562ab9306ec47360ce..84845919c4bc02a42352b5d5c34ba267b3e1eb26

and now i can't reproduce what i see

i don't see any makefile changes in ports, anything, outside of individual ports and unrelated categories

no changes locally either. it's still 13.4

i fixed it manually and now it's fully fixed

tho, i seemed to have only 3 outdated ports before, now i have 4? some of them are sub so i don't get it. i think i'm not fully at same level when i was before. maybe i also need to do pkg db dump diffs? i don't like "quantum" bugs
